rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually and methodologically close: it models how ad creative/message features affect dynamic ad response over time, while the citing paper’s core contribution is also to link specific in-ad communication cues to advertising effectiveness in a dynamic sales framework. Given this overlap in focal constructs (creative/message content, carry-over/dynamic response) and modeling orientation, this does not look like a clearly incidental background mention, despite only DOI-level match evidence.
